name: E-GreenHub
details: Bengaluru's leading e-waste and paper recycling hub. Certified green processing facility with instant weight-based credit payouts.

name: WasteCycle Bengaluru
details: Convenient weekend drop-off specialize in bulky household recyclables, metals, and standard paper waste with friendly curbside loading assistance.

name: GoRecycle Bangalore
details: Premier industrial and automotive component recycling hub in Malleswaram. Highly rated environmental operations for safe hazardous waste disposal.
